questions.text: Where do most urban people work?
questions.explanation: Most urban people work in shops, offices, factories, and service sectors like hospitals and schools.

questions.text: Street vendors need a permanent shop to sell their goods.
questions.explanation: Street vendors often sell from temporary stalls or pushcarts. They don't have permanent shops.

questions.correctAnswer: A place where goods and services are bought and sold.
questions.explanation: A market is any place where buyers and sellers come together to exchange goods and services.

questions.text: People who work in offices are called ________ workers.
questions.explanation: White-collar workers typically work in offices and do administrative or professional work.
